name: docks
description: Multi-agent pipeline kit marketplace — Builder-Verifier patterns + engineering-convention skills + tiered subagents

plugins.name: docks
plugins.description: Multi-agent pipeline kit for Claude Code — Builder-Verifier commands where parallel agents add structural value, plus portable skills covering test-first / test-coverage / fix workflows, code review, human-docs, design tokenization, dependency-vuln triage, lint discipline, UI polish, generic SOLID, type-safety discipline, and React component patterns (effects + composition). Specialized subagents tier between Opus and Sonnet per phase.
